title: 1: Code Maintainability
1.1: Adds Input struct to textinputs.go with 2 fields: Value (string), IsDefault (bool)
1.2: Modifies GetInputs() to return map[string]Input instead of map[string]string
1.3: Assigns the field's Placeholder string as Value with IsDefault=true when a required field is empty in GetInputs() in textinputs.go
1.4: Updates SummarizeSource() to accept map[string]textinputs.Input parameter
1.5: Updates all 10 TUI source files (trufflehog_configure.go, circleci.go, docker.go, filesystem.go, gcs.go, git.go, github.go, gitlab.go, s3.go, syslog.go) to access input values via .Value field
1.6: Sets Required: true for GitHub org and repo InputConfig fields
1.7: Adds GetSpecialInputs() method to GitHub source with OR operation handling
1.8: Updates GCS source key and flag from project_id to project-id in gcs.go
1.9: Sets concurrency placeholder to runtime.NumCPU() in trufflehog_configure.go
1.10: Adds Azure Repos to enterprise sources in source_select.go
1.11: Updates GCS project-id placeholder from 'my-project' to 'trufflehog-testing' in gcs.go
1.12: Updates S3 bucket placeholder from 'my-bucket-name' to 'truffletestbucket' in s3.go
1.13: Adds help hint for Git URI field about file:// protocol
1.14: Removes trailing period typo from Git placeholder URL
2: Documentation Maintainability
3: Artifact Cleanup
3.1: Removes redundant empty-value checks in all 6 source files (circleci.go, filesystem.go, gcs.go, git.go, gitlab.go, syslog.go) for required fields that now have guaranteed values
4: Negative Rubrics
4.1: Uses GetInputs() instead of GetSpecialInputs() in GitHub Cmd() method
4.2: Applies placeholder fallback to non-required fields in GetInputs() (textinputs.go)
